message.content:
@startuml
participant s as s:ObjectStructure
participant a as a:CroncreteElementA
participant b as b:CroncreteElementB
participant v1 as v1:ConcreteVisitor1

s:ObjectStructure --> a:CroncreteElementA : accept(v1)
a:CroncreteElementA --> v1:ConcreteVisitor1 : visit(this)
v1:ConcreteVisitor1 --> a:CroncreteElementA : operationA()
a:CroncreteElementA --> s:ObjectStructure : (return)

s:ObjectStructure --> b:CroncreteElementB : accept(v1)
b:CroncreteElementB --> v1:ConcreteVisitor1 : visit(this)
v1:ConcreteVisitor1 --> b:CroncreteElementB : do nothing
b:CroncreteElementB --> s:ObjectStructure : (return)

@enduml
